task_completion.description: Open the patient record for Ana Betz.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A GNU Health window is open displaying the patient file for 'Ana Betz' (or 'Betz, Ana').

task_completion.description: Navigate to the patient's allergies section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Allergies' tab is selected or a new allergy entry form is open within Ana Betz's patient record.
The Pathology or Condition field in the allergy form contains 'Z88.0' or 'Allergy status to penicillin'.

task_completion.description: Set the allergy type to Drug Allergy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Type or Category field in the allergy form is set to 'Drug Allergy'.
The Severity field in the allergy form is set to 'Severe'.
The allergy record is saved, indicated by it appearing in the patient's list of allergies, or the save button/icon being clicked and the form entering a read-only/saved state.

integrity.description: The agent used the GNU Health graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the GNU Health desktop client, not terminal commands or database prompts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual GNU Health application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window has standard GNU Health/Tryton UI elements, menus, and icons, rather than a text editor or mocked interface.

integrity.description: The agent performed the steps manually rather than running a background script.
integrity.visual_evidence: The sequence of screenshots shows progressive UI states like opening menus, typing in fields, and selecting from dropdowns.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: 'Ana Betz' (may appear in the system as 'Betz, Ana' or 'Betz, Ana Isabel'). Pathology Code: 'Z88.0' corresponds to 'Allergy status to penicillin'. Allergy Type: The UI should display 'Drug Allergy' (internal system mapping 'da'). Severity: The UI should display 'Severe' (internal system mapping '3_sv').
